calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 439, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before such a motion may be filed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC's Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted:

No opposition filed; motion granted. The RFAs will be deemed admitted unless responses are served at or before the hearing on the motion.

Plaintiff/Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court via email to davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
